name: ecwid-realtime-mouse-tracker
description: Static Ecwid merchant dashboard for browser-only realtime mouse tracking self-tests.

scripts.preview: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4173 -d dist
scripts.lint: node --check src/shared/browser-state.js && node --check src/admin/app.js && node --check src/storefront/custom-storefront.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:ui
